titleStmt.title: SII 25.186: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 186. (A.R. No. 186 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned on grounds of palaeography to c. 13th Century.

It records the grant of lands (maḍakku-nilam) of the twelfth grade as the balance of the maḍam (maḍaśēsham) to a certain Āṇḍār Prasannadēvar who executed the repairs to the temple in the above year to the temple of Tiruvuśāttānam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār by the mahāsabhai including the kaṇakku (accountant) Śākkāṉam-uḍaiyāṉ Danmappiriyaṉ of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. Among the boundaries of the land given to Prasannadēvar, is mentioned the field to the west of the lands of a certain Vikkiramaśōḻa-mūvēndavēḷār of Rājēndraśōḻapuram and the reference is made to the revenue survey that is done in the 38th year of the king.

Such a classified and surveyed land is stated to have been made over as iṟaiyili free from taxes such as antarāyap-pāṭṭam, etc., for the foodofferings to be made to the deities of the Śaiva saints Piḷḷaiyār-Nāyaṉār (Tirujñānasambandar), Tirunāvukkaraśu-nāyaṉār (Appar) and Sundaranāyaṉār consecrated in the circumambulatory path (tirunaḍai-māḷigai) in the temple of Tiruvuśāttānam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār.
Here, the name of the king in whose 38th year the survey had been conducted is not mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakkaravatti
kaḷ śrīrājentiracoḻa tevaṟkku
yāṇṭu Onpatāvatiṉ ṉetirāmā
ṇṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉi
ccaturvvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi
mahāsabhayom Eḻuttu na
mmur kaṇakku cākkāṉamuṭaiyāṉ
tanmappiriyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār kaṇṭu na
murruṭaiyār tiruvucāttānamuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil tiruppaṇi cevvit
ta Āṇṭār piracaṉṉatevaṟkku maṭa ce
ṣamāka panniraṇṭāṉ tarattu Iṟup
pāka Iṭṭa Ūril tenmaruṅku maturān
takap periyerikku vaṭakku tarumivāy
kkālukku kiḻakku peruvaḻikku teṟ
kku Irācentira coḻapurattu vikki
rama coḻamu
venta veḷā
r nilattukku
meṟkku mup
patteṭṭāva
tu Aḷavim
paṭi rūpāy �1kāṇi
¿ kiḻakku muṉṟumā
tma Innilam
Iraṇṭu mā
kkāṇi Arai
kkāṇi kiḻarai
ye muṉṟu
mā mukkāṇiyu
m 5 vatu nā
ḷile tiru
nāmattu
kāṇiyāka
pukuttu kai
yil Iṉ
ṉāyaṉār
koyil te
ṟkkil tiru
naṭai māḷi
kaiyil E
ḻuntaruḷi
yiruntu pū
cai koṇ
ṭaruḷikiṟa piḷ
ḷai yaār ṉā
yaṉā
ṟkkum tirunāvukkaracu nāyaṉāṟkkum cu
ntara nāyaṉārkkum tiruvamutu paṭikkum Uṭalāka
inilattu paṉṉiraṇṭāntarattāl vanta tarappa
ṭi maṭakku rūpāy (1/2)�m Onpatā
vatin netirāmāṇṭu kār mutal Iṟuppu kaḻit
tu Iṟaiyili paṇṇikkuṭuttom Inta I
ta nilam Iraṇṭumāk
kāṇi Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye muṉṟu māmuk
kāṇikkum Antarāyappāṭṭam niṉaippiṭṭu
taṇ vaṟkkamum maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉa
vum Uṭpaṭa cantirātitavaraiyum Iṟaiyi
li ceytu kuṭuttom Ippaṭi kalveṭṭik
koḷḷavum coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyap
paṇiyāl lūrkaṇakku cāttāṉa muṭaiyān tanmam
piriyaṉ ṉeḻuttu . Ivai citaramaṇṭayapaṭṭaṉ
ṉeḻuttu . Ivai kāya kappaṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu .
Ivai kaḷattūr koviñcapaṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu . I
vai Uttama paṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttu . Ivai kaḷattūr kirā
mapaṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu . Ivai pālūr tiruveṇaṅ
ka paṭṭaṉ ṉeḻuttu . Ivai Irāyūr mu ko
ṭi Irāya nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu . Ivai
Irāma paṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu
Āṇṭi nampipaṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu . Ivai periya nampi tā
motirapaṭṭaṉṉeḻuttu ceñlūrkkuṉikkumpirāṉ paṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai Iḷaiyanampi
cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi kka
Ivai miḻalaikka potacurapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
